title: Resources & Referrals
description: These resources are available to you and your community.

resources.name: Your Local IHS Clinic
resources.description: Contact your local Indian Health Service clinic for STI testing and treatment services.

resources.name: Great Plains Tribal Leaders Health Board
resources.description: Resources and programs for tribal health.

resources.name: CDC STI Information
resources.description: Comprehensive information about sexually transmitted infections.

resources.name: PrEP Information
resources.description: Learn about pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP) for HIV prevention.

resources.name: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline
resources.description: Free, confidential support 24/7. Call or text 988.

resources.name: SAMHSA National Helpline
resources.description: Free referrals and information for mental health and substance use.

resources.name: SAMHSA National Helpline
resources.description: Free, confidential treatment referrals and information, available 24/7.

resources.name: White Bison Wellbriety Movement
resources.description: Culturally based healing resources for Native communities.

resources.name: National Domestic Violence Hotline
resources.description: Confidential support 24/7. Call, text, or chat.

resources.name: StrongHearts Native Helpline
resources.description: Culturally appropriate support for Native Americans affected by domestic violence and dating violence.

resources.name: 211 Information Line
resources.description: Connect to local resources for food, housing, transportation, and more. Dial 2-1-1.

resources.name: Healthy Native Youth - VOICES
resources.description: Sexual health resources created for and by Native youth.
